r=g==="hash"?n.getAttribute("href"):n.pathname;D(r)}),v()},on(t,e){return $.push(e),()=>{const o=$.indexOf(e);o>=0&&$.splice(o,1)}}};let z=1;const c=b([]),N=b("all"),J=T(()=>{const t=N.value,e=c.value;return t==="active"?e.filter(o=>!o.done):t==="completed"?e.filter(o=>o.done):e}),h=T(()=>c.value.filter(t=>!t.done).length),P=T(()=>c.value.length);function Q(t){const e=t.trim();e&&(c.value=[...c.value,{id:z++,text:e,done:!1}])}function V(t){c.value=c.value.map(e=>e.id===t?{...e,done:!e.done}:e)}function X(t){c.value=c.value.filter(e=>e.id!==t)}function Y(){c.value=c.value.filter(t=>!t.done)}function Z(){const t=h.value===0;c.value=c.value.map(e=>({...e,done:!t}))}const M=class M extends j{constructor(){super(...arguments),this.inputText=b("")}render(){return d`
      <form class="todo-input" @submit=${e=>{e.preventDefault(),Q(this.inputText.value),this.inputText.value=""}}>
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="What needs to be done?"
          .value=${this.inputText}
          @input=${e=>{this.inputText.value=e.target.value}}
        >
        <button type="submit">Add</button>
      </form>
    `}};M.shadow=!1;let S=M;customElements.define("todo-input",S);const x=class x extends j{render(){return d`
      <li class="todo-item" ?data-done=${this.prop("done")}>
        <label>
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            ?checked=${this.prop("done")}
            @change=${()=>V(this.prop("todoId").value)}
          >
          <span>${this.prop("text")}</span>
        </label>
        <button
          class="remove"
          @click=${()=>X(this.prop("todoId").value)}
        >&times;</button>
      </li>
    `}};x.props={todoId:Number,text:String,done:Boolean},x.shadow=!1;let E=x;customElements.define("todo-item",E);function ee(){return d`
    <div class="todo-app">
      <header>
        <h1>todos</h1>
        <nav>
          <a href="/">Home</a>
          <a href="/about">About</a>
        </nav>
      </header>

      <todo-input></todo-input>

      ${()=>P.value>0?d`
        <section class="main">
          <label class="toggle-all-label">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              class="toggle-all"
              ?checked=${()=>h.value===0}
              @change=${()=>Z()}
            >
            Mark all as complete
          </label>

          <ul class="todo-list">
            ${()=>J.value.map(t=>d`
              <todo-item
                todoId="${t.id}"
                text="${t.text}"
                ?done=${t.done}
              ></todo-item>
            `)}
          </ul>
        </section>

        <footer class="footer">
          <span class="count">
            ${()=>`${h.value} item${h.value!==1?"s":""} left`}
          </span>

          <div class="filters">
            ${["all","active","completed"].map(t=>d`
              <button
                class="${()=>N.value===t?"selected":""}"
                @click=${()=>{N.value=t}}
              >${t}</button>
            `)}
          </div>

          ${()=>P.value-h.value>0?d`<button class="clear" @click=${()=>Y()}>Clear completed</button>`:null}
        </footer>
      `:d`
        <p class="empty">Add your first todo above!</p>
      `}
    </div>
  `}L("/",ee);L("/about",()=>d`
  <div class="page about">
    <h1>About</h1>
    <p>A todo app built with <strong>tina4-js</strong> — a sub-3KB reactive framework.</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Signals for state management</li>
      <li>Tagged template literals for rendering</li>
      <li>Web Components for reusable UI</li>
      <li>Client-side routing</li>
    </ul>
    <p><a href="/">Back to todos</a></p>
  </div>
`);L("*",()=>d`
  <div class="page">
    <h1>404</h1>
    <p>Page not found. <a href="/">Go home</a></p>
  </div>
`);G.start({target:"#root",mode:"hash"});
